product_overview: A restaurant production platform module that lets users print thermal labels, QR-enabled batch labels, and standard operational documents directly from the web app. It also provides admin configuration for label templates and supports keyboard-emulation scanners for traceability workflows.
core_goals: Print batch and product labels with traceability data and QR codes
Print production and operational documents in a clean A4 format
Allow administrators to configure default label templates and QR settings
Support scanner-based lookup workflows for batch and product identification
Track print actions for auditing and reprint accountability

features.name: Thermal Label Printing
features.description: Users can generate and print thermal labels for batches and products with localized names, batch information, expiry dates, storage details, and QR codes.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a batch or product record from the production workflow -> Choose to print a label -> Select the desired label size -> Preview the label -> Submit the print job -> See the browser print dialog with the label formatted for the selected template

Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a completed batch record -> Choose to print a label -> Preview the label -> Submit the print job -> See the printed label produced with the batch information and QR code
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a draft batch record -> Attempt to print a label -> See printing is unavailable until the batch is active

features.name: Operational Document Printing
features.description: Users can print production orders, recipes, inventory summaries, and transfer-related documents in a clean A4 or Letter document layout for offline use in operations.
user_flows: Navigate to /production -> Open a completed production order -> Choose to print the order sheet -> Preview the document in a print-friendly layout -> Submit the print job -> See the browser print dialog for a standard document printer
Navigate to /recipes -> Open a recipe record -> Choose to print the recipe -> Preview the formatted document -> Submit the print job -> See a clean document printout without interactive web controls
Navigate to /inventory -> Open a stock summary view -> Choose to print the summary -> Preview the document -> Submit the print job -> See the document prepared for standard paper printing

features.name: Label Template Configuration
features.description: Administrators can configure default label sizes and QR code settings that affect subsequent label generation.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users -> Access the administrative configuration area -> Open label template settings -> Select a default label size -> Save the configuration -> See subsequent label printing default to the new template size

Navigate to /admin/users -> Access the administrative configuration area -> Open QR code settings -> Adjust the error correction level -> Save the configuration -> See later labels generated with the updated QR configuration

features.name: Print Audit and Reprint Tracking
features.description: The system records print actions so users can review who printed a label, when it was printed, and whether it was an initial print or a reprint.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a batch record -> Print a label once -> Print the same label again -> Select a reprint reason -> See the second action recorded as a reprint in the audit history
Navigate to /dashboard -> Open a batch record -> Review print history -> See the timestamp, operator, target record, and print type for each prior print action

features.name: Scanner-Based Lookup
features.description: Users can scan barcodes or QR codes into focused fields to trigger automatic lookups for batches or products during production and warehouse work.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory -> Focus a lookup field -> Scan a batch or product code with a keyboard-emulation scanner -> See the matching record open automatically
Navigate to /production -> Focus a lookup field -> Scan a QR code from a printed label -> See the corresponding batch information load for traceability

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: View overall metrics and recent notifications
